3047600.name: Ultreïa - Night of the Eclipse
3047600.description:
It's recommended to play the original game first, as this new chapter could spoil key elements of the original story.

Check the original game :

About Ultreïa - Night of the Eclipse

Experience a brief yet captivating chapter in Nymo's journey and explore the mysterious desert of Ultreïa during the Night of the Eclipse.

Features

  • A short, captivating prequel story designed to be played after the original Ultreïa
  • Explore new and familiar locations under the magical ambiance of the Eclipse
  • Solve inventive puzzles with a fresh perspective
  • Stunning original art and sound design that expands on the Ultreïa universe
  • A captivating soundtrack by Yann Latour that enriches the atmosphere
